name: Houston Toad
habitatType: Pine and oak woodland with sandy soil
conservationEfforts: Houston Zoo captive breeding program. Bastrop County habitat conservation plan. Post-wildfire habitat restoration after 2011 Bastrop Complex fire.
description: One of the most endangered amphibians in the US, restricted to sandy soils in central Texas. It was nearly wiped out by a severe drought and devastating wildfire in 2011.
